hero.title: Search songs or manage your channel.

about.body: RockList.Live helps Rocksmith streamers take requests and manage their playlists.

features.surfaceRequestsBody: Viewers add songs on the playlist page, in chat, or from the Twitch panel extension.
features.moderationBody: Moderators can manage requests while the stream is live.
features.rulesBody: Control blacklists, setlists, moderation, and request settings for your channel.

live.title: Current streamers
live.demoOnly: The streamers shown here are for demo purposes only.
live.empty: No streamers are live with the bot active yet.
